text: 🔄 Forwarded from Fotros Resistance: 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 | CONFIRMED : An hour ago, an Iranian bulk carrier ship carrying a cargo of rice, despite the US Navy's attempt to seize it, was escorted by the IRGC-Navy and, after safely passing through the Sea of Oman, arrived safely in Iran — Fars @FotrosResistancee
text_zh: 🔄 转发自 Fotros Resistance：🇮🇷 🇺🇸 | 已确认：一小时前，一艘载有大米货物的伊朗散货船，尽管美国海军试图扣押，但在伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队海军的护航下，安全通过阿曼湾，顺利抵达伊朗 — 法尔斯通讯社 @FotrosResistancee

text: Trump: We don’t know who the leader is in Iran because, remember, regime change.
text_zh: 特朗普：我们不知道伊朗的领导人是谁，因为，请记住，政权更迭。

text: 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 ⚡ Trump: If they don't respond to our efforts to reach a deal, we will resume military action. 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 ⚡ 特朗普：如果他们不对我们达成协议的努力做出回应，我们将恢复军事行动。 🚩 ResistanceTrench | 推广

text: Trump: Greece has been very supportive; he is a terrific guy.
text_zh: 特朗普：希腊一直非常支持；他是个了不起的人。

text: Reporter: What if oil goes to 200? Trump: There is nothing worse than a nuclear weapon that takes out cities.
text_zh: 记者：如果油价涨到200美元怎么办？ 特朗普：没有什么比摧毁城市的核武器更糟糕的了。

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 Reports of IRGC navy escorting an Iranian vessel despite US ‘blockade’
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 有报道称，尽管美国实施“封锁”，伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队海军仍在为一艘伊朗船只护航

text: 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Trump calls the American news outlets reporting on his defeat in Iran as "fake news". 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 特朗普称报道他伊朗政策失败的美国新闻媒体为“假新闻”。 🚩 ResistanceTrench | 推广

text: Trump on Iran: We’ve never had so much ammunition. Our ships are loaded. Locked and loaded. They’re ready to go.
text_zh: 特朗普谈伊朗：我们从未拥有过如此多的弹药。我们的船只装满了。蓄势待发。它们随时准备出发。

text: Trump on Iran: If they don’t get their oil moving, their whole oil infrastructure is going to explode. Because they have no place to store it.
text_zh: 特朗普谈伊朗：如果他们不让石油流动起来，他们的整个石油基础设施都将爆炸。因为他们没有地方储存石油。

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Channel 14: Last night, a very serious incident took place in southern Lebanon - Hezbollah attacked an IDF convoy with a Kamikaze drone. Additional details remain under censorship. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 第14频道：昨晚，黎巴嫩南部发生了一起非常严重的事件——真主党用自杀式无人机袭击了以色列国防军的车队。更多细节仍处于审查中。 @wfwitness

text: Trump on Iran: They came to us, and they said "we will agree to open the strait," and all my people are happy. Everybody was happy—except me. I said, wait a minute. If we open this strait, that means they’re going to make 500 million dollars a day. I don’t want them to make 500 million dollars a day until they settle this thing, so I’m the one that kept it closed. We have total control of it. And it’ll open when they make a deal or something else happens.
text_zh: 特朗普谈伊朗：他们来找我们，说“我们同意开放海峡”，我的人都很高兴。每个人都很高兴——除了我。我说，等一下。如果我们开放这个海峡，意味着他们每天能赚5亿美元。在他们解决这件事之前，我不想让他们每天赚5亿美元，所以我才是那个保持封锁的人。我们完全控制着它。当他们达成协议或发生其他事情时，它就会开放。

text: 🇺🇸 When you're tired of winning 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 当你厌倦了胜利时 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Trump: We’ve hit about 75 percent of our targets. We stopped a little early because they wanted to have some peace. We have a blockade that’s 100 percent effective. And they’re getting no business. They want to make a deal. We have been speaking to them, but they don’t even know who’s leading the country. They’re in turmoil.
text_zh: 特朗普：我们已经打击了大约75%的目标。我们提前停止了，因为他们想要和平。我们实施了100%有效的封锁。他们没有任何生意可做。他们想要达成协议。我们一直在与他们交谈，但他们甚至不知道是谁在领导这个国家。他们正处于混乱之中。

text: 🇺🇸 Trump Administration math ain't mathing... 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 特朗普政府的算术算不明白…… 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Reporter: How long are you willing to wait on Iran? Trump: No rush for me.
text_zh: 记者：你愿意等伊朗多久？ 特朗普：我不急。

text: Trump: They are fighting like cats and dogs over the leadership of Iran.
text_zh: 特朗普：他们正在为伊朗的领导权打得不可开交。

text: Trump: The navy secretary had some conflicts with Pete and some other people.
text_zh: 特朗普：海军部长与皮特及其他人之间存在一些冲突。

text: Open Source Intel French President Macron: "When Cyprus is attacked, it is Europe that is attacked. France loves Cyprus… our role is to be by your side when times are difficult." https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047404303824916680/video/1 Greek Cyprus President Nikos Christodoulides: "Soon, in June, the SOFA agreement will be signed, which will concern the hosting of French forces on Cypriot territory in the context of 'humanitarian operations' in our region." https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047402603969978544/video/1 - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 法国总统马克龙：“当塞浦路斯受到攻击时，就是欧洲受到攻击。法国热爱塞浦路斯……我们的职责是在困难时期站在你们身边。” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047404303824916680/video/1 希腊裔塞浦路斯总统尼科斯·克里斯托多利季斯：“很快，在六月，我们将签署《部队地位协定》（SOFA），这将涉及在我国地区‘人道主义行动’的背景下，在塞浦路斯领土上接待法国军队。” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047402603969978544/video/1 - 开源情报推文

text: Open Source Intel A U.S. Navy sailor aboard a minesweeper en route to the Middle East was medically evacuated after a monkey scratch during a stop in Thailand. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047403984579600813/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 一名在前往中东途中的扫雷舰上的美国海军水兵，在泰国停留期间因被猴子抓伤而接受了医疗后送。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047403984579600813/photo/1 推文

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇺🇸 According to Bloomberg, the U.S. Air Force plans to acquire around 4,300 JASSM-ER stealth cruise missiles from Lockheed Martin over the next five years. ▪️ The move is aimed at replenishing missile stockpiles depleted by recent operations and expected to decline further if hostilities against Iran resume. See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 tweet
text_zh: Visioner 转推 @NSTRIKE1231 ：🇺🇸 据彭博社报道，美国空军计划在未来五年内从洛克希德·马丁公司采购约4,300枚JASSM-ER隐身巡航导弹。▪️ 此举旨在补充因近期行动而耗尽的导弹库存，如果针对伊朗的敌对行动恢复，预计库存将进一步下降。与我们一起查看最新更新：@NSTRIKE1231 推文

text: Open Source Intel The Trump administration is considering raising the U.S. refugee cap by 10,000 to admit more white South Africans, citing claims of racial persecution. South Africa denies the claims. The current cap is 7,500. - Reuters https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047401795983470727/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 特朗普政府正在考虑将美国难民上限提高10,000人，以接纳更多白人南非人，理由是他们声称受到种族迫害。南非否认了这些说法。目前的上限为7,500人。 - 路透社 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047401795983470727/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Zelensky: "The United States produces about 60–65 Patriot PAC-3 missiles per month… it's nothing. During the first day of attack on Middle East, they used the volume of two years production of such missiles." https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047400222184157297/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 泽连斯基：“美国每月生产约60-65枚爱国者PAC-3导弹……这根本不算什么。在中东遭受攻击的第一天，他们就消耗了相当于两年产量的此类导弹。” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047400222184157297/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel This is a war in the shadows. In 2024, 79,384 Americans died from fentanyl overdoses linked to supply chains originating in China. A man in Seattle found a young man on the ground after an apparent fentanyl overdose. He administered 3 doses of Narcan and revived him. I have a lot of questions. The main one is how did the U.S. reach a point where random people carry Narcan just in case? FYI, China is the main source of fentanyl precursor chemicals, gets sent to the cartels then they synthesize the finished fentanyl and smuggle it across the US southern border. Video credit on TT: @Gabethe4 - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 这是一场阴影中的战争。2024年，有79,384名美国人死于与源自中国的供应链相关的芬太尼过量。西雅图的一名男子在地上发现了一名疑似芬太尼过量的年轻人。他施用了3剂纳洛酮（Narcan）并将其救活。我有很多疑问。最主要的一个是，美国是如何走到这一步的，以至于普通人都要随身携带纳洛酮以防万一？供参考，中国是芬太尼前体化学品的主要来源地，这些化学品被运往贩毒集团，然后由他们合成成品芬太尼并走私越过美国南部边境。视频来源：TT @Gabethe4 - 开源情报推文

text: Faytuks News BREAKING: Iran has deployed more mines in the Strait of Hormuz in recent days, sources tell Axios tweet
text_zh: Faytuks News 快讯：消息人士告诉Axios，伊朗近日在霍尔木兹海峡部署了更多水雷 推文

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) U.S. Navy Nimitz-class aircraft carrier USS George H.W. Bush (CVN 77) entered the U.S. Central Command area of responsibility. The US now has three aircraft carriers in the CENTCOM AoR. Nimitz-class aircraft carrier USS George H.W. Bush (CVN 77) sails in the Indian Ocean in the U.S. Central Command area of responsibility, April 23. https://twitter.com/CENTCOM/status/2047375382135947468/photo/1 - U.S. Central Command tweet
text_zh: Status-6 (战争与军事新闻) 美国海军尼米兹级航空母舰乔治·H·W·布什号（CVN 77）进入了美国中央司令部责任区。美国目前在中央司令部责任区内拥有三艘航空母舰。4月23日，尼米兹级航空母舰乔治·H·W·布什号（CVN 77）在美国中央司令部责任区的印度洋航行。 https://twitter.com/CENTCOM/status/2047375382135947468/photo/1 - 美国中央司令部推文

text: Open Source Intel RFK Jr: "A Democratic senator claimed it's mathematically impossible to have a drug drop by 600%. I said, 'Well, if the drug was $100 and it raises to $600, that would be a 600% rise. If it drops from $600 to $100, that's a 600% savings.'" Trump: "Right" https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047398119713738889/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 小罗伯特·肯尼迪：“一位民主党参议员声称，药物价格下降600%在数学上是不可能的。我说，‘好吧，如果药物价格是100美元，涨到600美元，那就是涨了600%。如果它从600美元降到100美元，那就是节省了600%。’” 特朗普：“没错” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047398119713738889/video/1 推文

text: WarTranslated Budanov commented on the negotiations, stating that it is highly unlikely that Ukrainians would agree to give up even a millimeter of territory. https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2047397812036386953/video/1 tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 布达诺夫就谈判发表评论称，乌克兰人极不可能同意放弃哪怕一毫米的领土。 https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2047397812036386953/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Trump: "Actually, I've had many companies -- I shouldn't tell you this, Bobby -- but there have many companies saying, 'Sir, we'd like to buy from if you could.' 'What?' 'TrumpRx dot com.'" https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047397572705194134/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 特朗普：“实际上，我有很多公司——我不该告诉你这个，鲍比——但有很多公司说，‘先生，如果可以的话，我们想从您那里购买。’‘什么？’‘TrumpRx点com。’” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047397572705194134/video/1 推文

text: Prof. Robert Pape on Iran War: Trump is trying to find a third way… ‘just give me the fig leaf so I can declare victory.’ Iran is not doing that… they want to torpedo Donald Trump’s presidency.
text_zh: 罗伯特·佩普教授谈伊朗战争：特朗普正试图寻找第三条道路……‘只要给我一个遮羞布，我就可以宣布胜利。’伊朗不吃这一套……他们想摧毁唐纳德·特朗普的总统任期。

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 Supreme Leader of Iran Mojtaba Khamenei says that the unity of Iranians caused a fracture in their enemies. He reports that the enemies of Iran are trying to undermine the unity of the country with psychological operations. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 伊朗最高领袖莫杰塔巴·哈梅内伊表示，伊朗人的团结导致了敌人的分裂。他指出，伊朗的敌人正试图通过心理战来破坏国家的团结。 @wfwitness

text: Prof. Robert Pape on Iran War: Trump has the illusion of control… Trump’s just lost control. America’s not winning… Trump is not in control. Iran has cards to play… they are more in control as each day passes.
text_zh: 罗伯特·佩普教授谈伊朗战争：特朗普有一种控制的错觉……特朗普已经失去了控制。美国没有赢……特朗普无法掌控局面。伊朗有牌可打……随着每一天的过去，他们对局势的掌控力更强。

text: ⚡ 🇺🇦 🇷🇺 Ukrainians demonstrated for the first time the use of interceptor drones launched from an An-28 light aircraft. The use of such aircrafts and helicopters with a door gunner are widely known and have proven to be an effective solution against Russian drones. The use of air-launched drones (or propeller powered air-to-air missiles) is an extension of the concept. The aircraft is now capable of intercepting targets at a safer distance. Such combinaison allows a drone team in the plane to follow drone swarms rather than waiting for them to come into range. 0:16 the launch of a P1-SUN 0:39 the launch of a MEROP @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇺🇦 🇷🇺 乌克兰人首次展示了使用从安-28轻型飞机上发射的拦截无人机。此类飞机和配备舱门机枪手的直升机的使用广为人知，并已被证明是应对俄罗斯无人机的有效解决方案。使用空射无人机（或螺旋桨驱动的空对空导弹）是这一概念的延伸。该飞机现在能够在更安全的距离拦截目标。这种组合允许飞机上的无人机团队跟随无人机群，而不是等待它们进入射程。0:16 P1-SUN的发射 0:39 MEROP的发射 @wfwitness

text: French President Macron: When Cyprus is attacked, it is Europe that is attacked. France loves Cyprus… our role is to be by your side when times are difficult.
text_zh: 法国总统马克龙：当塞浦路斯受到攻击时，就是欧洲受到攻击。法国热爱塞浦路斯……我们的职责是在困难时期站在你们身边。

text: Israeli soldiers have looted civilian property in southern Lebanon on a large scale, according to testimonies from IDF personnel. Items taken reportedly include motorcycles, TVs, furniture, and even valuables like gold. Soldiers say the practice has become routine, with many openly loading stolen goods into vehicles. While commanders are aware, they often fail to punish those involved. Source: Haaretz
text_zh: 据以色列国防军人员的证词，以色列士兵在黎巴嫩南部大规模洗劫了平民财产。据报道，被拿走的物品包括摩托车、电视机、家具，甚至还有黄金等贵重物品。士兵们表示，这种做法已成为常态，许多人公开将赃物装上车辆。虽然指挥官们知情，但往往不对相关人员进行惩罚。来源：国土报

text: Greek Cyprus President Nikos Christodoulides: Soon, in June, the SOFA agreement will be signed, which will concern the hosting of French forces on Cypriot territory in the context of "humanitarian operations" in our region.
text_zh: 塞浦路斯总统尼科斯·赫里斯托祖利季斯：SOFA协议将于今年6月签署，该协议将涉及在我国地区进行“人道主义行动”的背景下，在塞浦路斯领土上接待法国军队的相关事宜。

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 A senior political figure in Hezbollah, Mahmoud Qamati, says that if the ceasefire isn’t renewed this Sunday then the conflict will resume without restriction. We are fighting the occupying enemy on our land, and if the ceasefire is not renewed this coming Sunday, then the war must be open (without restrictions) - Haifa, Tel Aviv, and beyond. Our response will follow this principle: if Israel attacks from Lebanese territory, we will strike back within Lebanon, and if it attacks from Israeli territory— we will strike its territory. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 真主党高级政治人物马哈茂德·卡马蒂表示，如果停火协议不在本周日续签，冲突将毫无限制地恢复。我们正在自己的土地上与占领者作战，如果本周日不续签停火协议，那么战争必须是公开的（无限制的）——海法、特拉维夫及更远的地方。我们的回应将遵循这一原则：如果以色列从黎巴嫩领土发动攻击，我们将在黎巴嫩境内进行反击；如果它从以色列领土发动攻击，我们将打击其领土。@wfwitness

text: The Trump administration is considering raising the U.S. refugee cap by 10,000 (from 7,500) to admit more white South Africans, citing claims of racial persecution—claims denied by South Africa. Source: Reuters
text_zh: 特朗普政府正在考虑将美国难民接收上限提高10,000人（从7,500人提高），以接纳更多白人南非人，理由是他们声称遭受种族迫害——南非否认了这些说法。来源：路透社

text: 📝 Главное от Рыбаря 📝 дайджест материалов за 23 апреля Иранская война во всех умах: Трамп вроде бы дал заднюю, но усиливать группировку не перестал. Да и авиация особо активно тренируется , а спутники все также наблюдают за Ираном ❗️ Подробнее об этих и других темах читайте в нашем дайджесте. ➡️ Рыбарь @rybar — говорим о сложном просто. Основной ресурс нашего аналитического центра. Самые важные и интересные материалы. ▪️ Хроника СВО, обстановка на Бурлукском направлении , бои на Западно-Запорожском направлении , атаки по нефтяной промышленности т.н. Украины ▪️ Новый омбудсмен ▪️ Зачем России поддерживать присутствие в ЮНЕСКО ▪️ Новый комикс от Рыбаря ▪️ Тренировочные полеты ВВС США ▪️ Коалиция наращивает корабельную группировку ▪️ Что снимают американские спутники в Иране ▪️ «Российский Palantir» наращивает прибыль ▪️ О новых историях про верховного лидера Ирана ➡️ АЗИАТАРЬ @rybar_pacific На Тайване скоро появятся новые радары — надо же как-то следить за китайским флотом. Филиппины вновь стали курортом для иностранных военнослужащих, так как там начались масштабные учения. А в Японии говорят о стратегии в оборонном производстве. ➡️ АМЕРИКАРЬ @rybar_america Трамп периодически говорит лишнего, глава Пентагона вышвыривает очередного подчинённого, а Калифорния превращается в головную боль для демократов. ➡️ АФРИКАРЬ @rybar_Africa Франция возвращает Африке барабаны и короны, но из 10 000 украденных артефактов отдала лишь 28. И пока французы торгуют безделушками, бразильская Petrobras под видом партнёрства отжимает у африканцев до 75% долей в нефтяных проектах. ➡️ БАЛКАНАРЬ @balkanar Пока черногорские моряки стали заложниками конфликта на Ближнем Востоке, в хорватских школах творится настоящий хаос: анонимы рассылают сообщения о минировании, а власти пока не могут с этим справиться. ➡️ ЕВРОПАРЬ @evropar Разобрали, зачем принц Гарри снова прибыл в Киев и в чём основные проблемы с планом евробюрократов AccelerateEU. В Великобритании продолжаются дрязги из-за назначения Питера Мандельсона послом США, а премьера страны в который раз призывают покинуть пост из-за этой истории. ➡️ КАВКАЗАРЬ @caucasar Эстонцы помогут армянам в борьбе с «дезинформацией», власти Армении решили отжать имущество церкви за рубежом и переговорить с европейцами в преддверии форума ЕПС, а родственники погибших военнослужащих вышли на протест. Американцы вновь обращают внимание на территорию Грузии ➡️ ЛАТИНАРЬ @rybar_latam Бразильские власти выслали сотрудника таможенной полиции США, а в Никарагуа население не против американского давления. Погибшие в Мексике американцы были сотрудниками ЦРУ, а в Перу ушли в отставку ключевые министры. ➡️ ОРИЕНТАРЬ @rybar_mena В Иране тревога , хотя и ложная: американцы бомбить еще не начали, зато корабли захватывать не прекратили . Израильтяне тем временем снова убивают журналистов, а перемирие на юге Ливана постепенно сходит на нет . ➡️ ТУРАНАРЬ @rybar_stan Санкции ЕС против России ударили и по Киргизии. На этом фоне Жапаров приехал на встречу с Путиным. Зато в самой Киргизии депутаты ведут свою войну с русским языком. ©️ Подписывайтесь на все каналы ©️ #дайджест #итоги ✈️ RU | ✈️ EN | ✉️ MAX 💸 Поддержать нас
text_zh: 📝 Рыбарь（Rybar）要闻摘要 📝 4月23日材料摘要：伊朗战争在每个人心中：特朗普似乎退缩了，但并没有停止加强军事部署。航空部队训练非常积极，卫星也在持续监视伊朗。❗️ 欲了解这些及其他主题的详细信息，请阅读我们的摘要。➡️ Рыбарь @rybar — 用简单的话说复杂的事。我们分析中心的主要资源。最重要和最有趣的材料。▪️ 特别军事行动纪事、布尔卢克方向局势、西扎波罗热方向战斗、针对所谓乌克兰石油工业的袭击 ▪️ 新任监察员 ▪️ 俄罗斯为何要维持在教科文组织的存在 ▪️ Рыбарь的新漫画 ▪️ 美国空军训练飞行 ▪️ 联盟正在增加海军编队 ▪️ 美国卫星在伊朗拍摄什么 ▪️ “俄罗斯Palantir”利润增长 ▪️ 关于伊朗最高领袖的新故事 ➡️ АЗИАТАРЬ @rybar_pacific 台湾很快将出现新的雷达——毕竟需要某种方式来监视中国舰队。菲律宾再次成为外国军人的度假胜地，因为那里开始了大规模演习。日本则在谈论国防生产战略。 ➡️ АМЕРИКАРЬ @rybar_america 特朗普时不时说多余的话，五角大楼负责人解雇了一名下属，加利福尼亚州正成为民主党人的头疼问题。 ➡️ АФРИКАРЬ @rybar_Africa 法国正在将鼓和王冠归还给非洲，但在10,000件被盗文物中，只归还了28件。当法国人交易小饰品时，巴西国家石油公司（Petrobras）正以伙伴关系为幌子，从非洲人手中夺取石油项目高达75%的股份。 ➡️ БАЛКАНАРЬ @balkanar 当黑山海员成为中东冲突的人质时，克罗地亚学校正陷入真正的混乱：匿名者发送炸弹威胁信息，当局目前无法应对。 ➡️ ЕВРОПАРЬ @evropar 分析了哈里王子为何再次抵达基辅，以及欧洲官僚的“加速欧盟”（AccelerateEU）计划存在的主要问题。英国因任命彼得·曼德尔森为美国大使而持续争吵，该国首相因这段历史再次被呼吁辞职。 ➡️ КАВКАЗАРЬ @caucasar 爱沙尼亚人将帮助亚美尼亚人打击“虚假信息”，亚美尼亚当局决定夺取教会的海外财产，并在欧洲政治共同体论坛前夕与欧洲人进行谈判，阵亡军人的亲属举行了抗议。美国人再次将注意力转向格鲁吉亚领土。 ➡️ ЛАТИНАРЬ @rybar_latam 巴西当局驱逐了一名美国海关警察，而在尼加拉瓜，民众并不反对美国的压力。在墨西哥死亡的美国人是中央情报局特工，秘鲁的关键部长们辞职了。 ➡️ ОРИЕНТАРЬ @rybar_mena 伊朗处于警报状态，尽管是虚假的：美国人还没有开始轰炸，但他们并没有停止扣押船只。与此同时，以色列人再次杀害记者，黎巴嫩南部的停火协议正逐渐失效。 ➡️ ТУРАНАРЬ @rybar_stan 欧盟对俄罗斯的制裁也打击了吉尔吉斯斯坦。在此背景下，扎帕罗夫抵达与普京会面。但在吉尔吉斯斯坦国内，议员们正在与俄语进行自己的战争。 ©️ 订阅所有频道 ©️ #摘要 #总结 ✈️ RU | ✈️ EN | ✉️ MAX 💸 支持我们

text: Zelensky: The United States produces about 60–65 Patriot PAC-3 missiles per month… it’s nothing. During the first day of attack on Middle East, they used the volume of two years production of such missiles.
text_zh: 泽连斯基：美国每月生产约60-65枚“爱国者”PAC-3导弹……这根本不算什么。在中东遭受袭击的第一天，他们就消耗了这种导弹两年的产量。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 The U.S. Department of War announced that U.S. forces have carried out a maritime interdiction and right‑of‑visit boarding of the stateless vessel M/T Majestic X, which was transporting oil from Iran, in the Indian Ocean within the INDOPACOM area of…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇨🇳 NYT: Shipping data indicates that the M/T Majestic, intercepted by the U.S. earlier this Thursday, was loaded with Chinese crude oil. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 美国战争部宣布，美军在印度-太平洋司令部区域内的印度洋上，对一艘无国籍船只M/T Majestic X号进行了海上拦截和登船检查，该船当时正在从伊朗运输石油……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇨🇳 纽约时报：航运数据显示，本周四早些时候被美国拦截的M/T Majestic号装载的是中国原油。@wfwitness

text: US Secretary of Health RFK Jr.: A Democratic senator said that it’s mathematically impossible to have a drug price drop by 600%. I said, “Well, if the drug was $100 and it rises to $600, that would be a 600% rise. If it drops from $600 to $100, that would be a 600% savings.”
text_zh: 美国卫生部长小罗伯特·肯尼迪：一位民主党参议员说，药品价格下降600%在数学上是不可能的。我说：“好吧，如果药价是100美元，涨到600美元，那就是涨了600%。如果它从600美元降到100美元，那就是节省了600%。”

text: Disclose.tv JUST IN - Iran deploys more mines in the Strait of Hormuz — Axios tweet
text_zh: Disclose.tv 突发 - 伊朗在霍尔木兹海峡部署了更多水雷 — Axios 推文

text: Open Source Intel Iran's Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei: "The enemy's media operations, by targeting the minds and psyches of the people, intend to undermine national unity and security; may our negligence not allow this sinister intent to come to fruition." https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047396765645635915/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 伊朗最高领袖莫杰塔巴·哈梅内伊：“敌人的媒体行动通过针对人民的思想和心理，意图破坏国家团结与安全；愿我们的疏忽不会让这一险恶企图得逞。” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047396765645635915/photo/1 推文

text: France proposed a deal for Greece to send its Mirage 2000 jets to Ukraine in exchange for discounted Rafale fighters. Source: Le Parisien
text_zh: 法国提议希腊将其幻影 2000 战斗机送往乌克兰，以换取折扣价的阵风战斗机。来源：巴黎人报

text: Open Source Intel Trump: "With this announcement, 17 of the world's largest pharmaceutical companies, representing 80% of the branded drug market have now agreed to sell their drugs to American patients at the lowest prices anywhere in the world." https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047396390880330132/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 特朗普：“随着这一宣布，代表全球 80% 品牌药市场的 17 家全球最大制药公司现已同意以全球最低价格向美国患者出售其药品。” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047396390880330132/video/1 推文

text: Visioner ‼️ 🇺🇸 The U.S. Air Force plans to significantly expand its stockpile of long-range stealth cruise missiles by purchasing nearly 4,300 units from Lockheed Martin over the next five years, Bloomberg reports. ➡️ The service intends to buy 821 missiles in the upcoming fiscal year, with annual purchases increasing to around 900 by 2028 and stabilizing at about 860 per year afterward. ➡️ The aim is to grow the total inventory to more than 11,000 missiles by 2031, up from about 6,700 acquired before 2025, as part of efforts to rebuild stockpiles depleted in recent operations. See the latest updates with us: @visionergeo tweet
text_zh: Visioner ‼️ 🇺🇸 据彭博社报道，美国空军计划在未来五年内从洛克希德·马丁公司购买近 4,300 枚远程隐身巡航导弹，以大幅扩大其库存。 ➡️ 该军种计划在下一个财政年度购买 821 枚导弹，到 2028 年年度采购量将增加到约 900 枚，此后每年稳定在约 860 枚。 ➡️ 此举旨在到 2031 年将总库存增加到 11,000 枚以上（2025 年前已获得约 6,700 枚），作为重建近期行动中消耗的库存工作的一部分。与我们一起查看最新更新：@visionergeo 推文

text_zh: 开源情报 伊斯兰革命卫队圣城旅指挥官卡尼：“我们都是‘伊朗人’和‘革命者’，在国家和政府的铁血团结下，在完全服从革命最高领袖的情况下，我们将让犯罪侵略者后悔。” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047394928221659480/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel More footage of the active shooter reported at Mall of Louisiana in Baton Rouge, Large law enforcement response underway. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047394408778109046/photo/1 UPDATE: 🔴 At least 6 people were hospitalized in a shooting at the Mall of Louisiana in Baton Rouge, local media report. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047393294582263878/video/1 - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 巴吞鲁日路易斯安那购物中心发生枪击事件的更多现场画面，大规模执法行动正在进行中。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047394408778109046/photo/1 更新：🔴 据当地媒体报道，巴吞鲁日路易斯安那购物中心发生的枪击事件中，至少有 6 人被送往医院。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047393294582263878/video/1 - 开源情报 推文
